archive_data.question_text: Pandit Birju Maharaj, Padma Bhushan awardee, was a globally renowned dancer of which of the following gharanas of Kathak?

explanation.english: Pandit Birju Maharaj belonged to the Lucknow gharana of Kathak, which traces its lineage to the Kalka-Bindadin duo. He was a descendant of this tradition and one of its most prominent exponents.
explanation.tanglish: Pandit Birju Maharaj Lucknow gharanai seiandha kathak natanar. Ithu Kalka-Bindadin parambarai ku seendhadhu. Avar indha parambaraiyin mukya Peekankar.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following cases is a member of the State Legislature NOT required to vacate his/her seat?

options.text: Absence for a week without permission

explanation.english: Under Article 190 of the Indian Constitution, a member must vacate their seat if disqualified, if elected to two seats (must vacate one), or if absent without permission for 60 days. Absence for only a week does not require vacation of the seat.
explanation.tanglish: Indhiya Arasangal Sattathin Kizhu Article 190, oru sutru pidariyil 60 naatkaluku mel illamal irunthal padavi yedukka vendum. Oru vaaram illamal irunthal padavi yeduppadathu.

archive_data.question_text: Name the monument constructed by Akbar in 1575 to celebrate his victory over Gujarat.

explanation.english: Buland Darwaza was built by Emperor Akbar in 1575 at Fatehpur Sikri to commemorate his victory over Gujarat. It is one of the highest gateways in the world and a masterpiece of Mughal architecture.
explanation.tanglish: Akbar 1575il Gujarat vetri ku aaga Fatehpur Sikri il Buland Darwaza kattinar. Ithu ulagin untha kadavugalil ondru.

archive_data.question_text: What does 'E' stand for in SEBI?

explanation.english: SEBI stands for Securities and Exchange Board of India. It is the regulatory body for securities and commodity markets in India, established in 1988.
explanation.tanglish: SEBI endral Securities and Exchange Board of India. Ithil E endral Exchange endru artham. Ithu India vil vaaniga marabum porulathara sattam seidhu kondadum asiriyam.

archive_data.question_text: Pandit Bhimsen Joshi is associated with the ________.

explanation.english: Pandit Bhimsen Joshi (1922-2011) was one of the most renowned vocalists of the Kirana gharana of Hindustani classical music, known for his powerful voice and mastery over khayal singing.
explanation.tanglish: Pandit Bhimsen Joshi Hindustani sangeethathil Kirana gharanai ku seendha perum paavalar. Avarudaiya kuralum khayal isa valarppum motham ulagukkum theriyum.

archive_data.question_text: The 'Kachin Manaw Festival' is associated with which of the following countries?

explanation.english: The Kachin Manaw Festival is a major cultural festival celebrated by the Kachin people in Myanmar (Burma). It involves traditional dancing around sacred totem poles to mark the new year and celebrate unity.
explanation.tanglish: Kachin Manaw Festival endrathu Myanmar desathil Kachin makkal kondadum oru pazhangathu vizha. Ithil pudhu varudamum ondrupadum aagavum suttam aduvargal.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is NOT a primary objective of the Special Economic Zone?

explanation.english: The primary objectives of SEZ (Special Economic Zone) include development of infrastructure, generation of employment, and promotion of exports. While clean technology may be encouraged, it is not listed as a primary objective under the SEZ Act 2005.
explanation.tanglish: SEZ mukya udesangal: Infrastructure valarpadu, velai vaaipu kalpithal, pattaiyal murai valarpadu. Punitha technology valarpadu mukya udesam alla.
